summary: The Optimism consensus validation module divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise across existing validation error returns; no validation behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 215: M	crates/optimism/consensus/src/validation/mod.rs.

No ommers root, transaction root, withdrawals root, receipt root, logs bloom, or gas-used validation behavior changed.
